title: Partial verification preserves definitive acknowledgement without replay

preconditions.description: The harness holds the inherited device-keyed lease before any device or fixture access.
The harness recorded session generation, display, layout, lock state, ATX-observable state, browser identity, and fixture identity.
The ATX sequence returns a definitive correlated serial receipt and the separate cached LED post-read can fail.

The harness records lifecycle state through structured establish, retire, connect-result, and reconnect-result fixtures; every input call consumes a separately captured fresh observation from the exact current successor generation.

fault_script.action: Arm a one-shot post-acknowledgement LED read failure for only power-with-post-read-failure after its definitive serial acknowledgement.
fault_script.expected_effect: The initial power call remains applied/device_ack_only with its unavailable or stale LED fact and zero replay.

fault_script.action: Unconditionally clear the initial power post-read fault after its one linked call while retaining the definitive acknowledgement.
fault_script.expected_effect: No initial LED read fault reaches ATX baseline restoration or the matrix cases.

fault_script.action: Arm a one-shot post-acknowledgement verification-read failure for only partial-verification-jetkvm-session-connect.
fault_script.expected_effect: The connect call remains applied/device_ack_only, publishes its exact structured result, and is not replayed.

fault_script.action: Unconditionally clear the connect post-read fault after its one linked call while retaining its successful result.
fault_script.expected_effect: No connect verification fault reaches result binding or reconnect.

fault_script.action: Arm a one-shot post-acknowledgement verification-read failure for only partial-verification-jetkvm-session-reconnect.
fault_script.expected_effect: The reconnect call remains applied/device_ack_only, publishes its exact successor, and is not replayed.

fault_script.action: Unconditionally clear the reconnect post-read fault after its one linked call while retaining its successful successor.
fault_script.expected_effect: No reconnect verification fault reaches successor binding or fresh capture.

fault_script.action: Arm a one-shot post-acknowledgement verification-read failure for only partial-verification-jetkvm-input-keyboard.
fault_script.expected_effect: The keyboard call remains applied/device_ack_only with exact counts and zero replay.

fault_script.action: Unconditionally clear the keyboard post-read fault after its one linked call while retaining its definitive acknowledgement.
fault_script.expected_effect: No keyboard verification fault reaches the independent mouse case.

fault_script.action: Arm a one-shot post-acknowledgement verification-read failure for only partial-verification-jetkvm-input-mouse.
fault_script.expected_effect: The mouse call remains applied/device_ack_only with exact counts and zero replay.

fault_script.action: Unconditionally clear the mouse post-read fault after its one linked call while retaining its definitive acknowledgement.
fault_script.expected_effect: No mouse verification fault reaches the independent paste case.

fault_script.action: Arm a one-shot post-acknowledgement verification-read failure for only partial-verification-jetkvm-input-paste.
fault_script.expected_effect: The paste call remains applied/device_ack_only with exact counts and zero replay.

fault_script.action: Unconditionally clear the paste post-read fault after its one linked call while retaining its definitive acknowledgement.
fault_script.expected_effect: No paste verification fault reaches the independent power case.

fault_script.action: Arm a one-shot post-acknowledgement LED read failure for only partial-verification-jetkvm-power-control after its definitive serial acknowledgement.
fault_script.expected_effect: The matrix power call remains applied/device_ack_only with its separately qualified LED fact and zero replay.

fault_script.action: Unconditionally clear the matrix power post-read fault after its one linked call while retaining the definitive acknowledgement.
fault_script.expected_effect: No matrix LED read fault survives final ATX baseline restoration and reproof.

steps.expect: The structured fixture establishes opaque-session generation 7 as the sole ready lifecycle session for the acknowledged ATX case.
applied with device_ack_only and a separate unavailable or stale LED fact.

After the acknowledged power call and failed LED post-read, the fixture restores the recorded ATX-observable baseline and re-proves the active extension, serial readiness, baseline, and current binding before arming the next linked partial-verification case.
After generation-7 ATX baseline restoration and reproof, the fixture retires the session and structurally proves no incumbent before takeover:false connect.
applied for jetkvm_session_connect, publishing opaque-partial-verification-session generation 8 with device_ack_only verification preserved after the post-acknowledgement read fails, and zero replay.
The structured connect result binds the exact returned session identity and generation for the next reconnect call.

applied for jetkvm_session_reconnect, replacing generation 8 with opaque-partial-verification-session generation 9 and preserving device_ack_only verification after the post-acknowledgement read fails, with zero replay and fresh_capture_required true.
The structured reconnect result binds the exact returned successor identity and generation and requires new observations.
A fresh generation-9 observation reserved as opaque-observation-partial-verification-input-keyboard.
applied for jetkvm_input_keyboard with device_ack_only verification preserved after the post-acknowledgement read fails, and zero replay.
A distinct fresh generation-9 observation reserved as opaque-observation-partial-verification-input-mouse.
applied for jetkvm_input_mouse with device_ack_only verification preserved after the post-acknowledgement read fails, and zero replay.
A distinct fresh generation-9 observation reserved as opaque-observation-partial-verification-input-paste.
applied for jetkvm_input_paste with device_ack_only verification preserved after the post-acknowledgement read fails, and zero replay.
The restored ATX-observable baseline, active extension, serial readiness, and exact current generation-9 binding are proven immediately before the matrix power call.
applied for jetkvm_power_control with device_ack_only verification preserved after the post-acknowledgement read fails, and zero replay.

After the final matrix power acknowledgement and failed optional post-read, restore the recorded ATX-observable baseline and re-prove the active extension, serial readiness, baseline, and exact current binding.

pass.assertion: For each applicable mutation, a definitive applied acknowledgement remains device_ack_only when its optional post-read verification fails and is never replayed; connect runs only after structured no-incumbent proof, reconnect consumes the exact returned connect identity and generation, later input uses fresh observations from the returned successor, and every ATX call retains final baseline restoration and reproof.

evidence.source: The linked focused assertion and ordered fake, replay, or live event record.

restore.action: Invoke generation-correlated emergency input release when a session exists.
restore.assertion: No held key, button, wheel producer, macro, or paste producer remains.

restore.action: Stop and join any Reliable Paste producer.
restore.assertion: Reliable Paste is inactive and its correlated producer is joined.

restore.action: Verify the fixture reports zero held keys and buttons.
restore.assertion: Held keyboard and pointer state is empty.

restore.action: Close only the device session created by this story and its browser resources.
restore.assertion: No story-owned browser, channel, or device session remains.

restore.action: Clear deterministic faults and restore the recorded fixture baseline.
restore.assertion: The next story starts only after the safe baseline is verified.

restore.action: Restore the recorded ATX-observable baseline using the reviewed fixture procedure while retaining the device lease.
restore.assertion: The baseline ATX-observable state is proven before the next story starts.

privacy.rule: Persist only allowlisted opaque identifiers, sanitized versions, counts, durations, hashes, outcomes, verification, and restoration results.
